releaseNotes:
• Recordings: the red REC dot now blinks clearly and the Recordings list updates itself live (Scheduled → Recording → Done) without a manual refresh.
• Channels can open faster the first time (the player waits for its video surface before starting, avoiding a slow decoder restart).
• New optional "Live pre-buffer" setting (Settings → off by default): turn it on if a channel stutters constantly on a slow provider or weak Wi-Fi — it pauses briefly to build a cushion instead of rebuffering every second (adds a small delay behind live).
